description: Workspace admins need to manage membership without editing the database directly.

userStories.title: Add audit log schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to add an audit log schema so membership changes can be recorded.

userStories.title: Add shared types for member management
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to define types for member roles and audit logs.
acceptanceCriteria: Define member role enum (viewer, editor, admin)

userStories.title: Add backend action to invite members
userStories.description: As an admin, I want the backend to support inviting members by email, recording this in the audit log.
acceptanceCriteria: Membership change is recorded in audit log

userStories.title: Add UI to invite members
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a UI to invite new members by email.
acceptanceCriteria: UI includes a form to invite members by email
Form submission calls the invite backend action
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend action to change roles
userStories.description: As an admin, I want the backend to support changing a member's role, recording this in the audit log.
acceptanceCriteria: Membership change is recorded in audit log

userStories.title: Add UI to change member role
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to change a member's role from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Member list includes a dropdown to change roles
Role change is saved via backend action
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend action to revoke access
userStories.description: As an admin, I want the backend to support revoking workspace access, recording this in the audit log.
acceptanceCriteria: Membership change is recorded in audit log

userStories.title: Add UI to revoke access
userStories.description: As an admin, I want a button to revoke access for a member in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: UI includes a button to revoke member access
Revocation calls the backend action and shows confirmation dialog
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add backend action to view audit log
userStories.description: As an admin, I want the backend to serve audit log records for membership changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend endpoint returns audit log records

userStories.title: Add UI to view audit log in settings
userStories.description: As an admin, I want to review recent membership changes in the workspace settings page.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page includes an audit log view
Audit log shows recent membership changes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
